testcase.name: GET /health contract > returns 200 with required fields: status, runner, protocol, engines, harnesses
GET /health contract > is reachable without a bearer token even when AGENTA_RUNNER_TOKEN is set
POST /run auth contract > no token configured → 200 (default-off gate)
POST /run auth contract > token configured, no header → 401 {ok:false, error:/Unauthorized/}
POST /run auth contract > token configured, wrong bearer → 401
POST /run auth contract > token configured, correct Authorization: Bearer → 200
POST /run auth contract > token configured, correct X-Agenta-Runner-Token → 200
POST /run response schema contract > success → 200 {ok:true, output:string}
POST /run response schema contract > engine failure → 500 {ok:false, error:string}
POST /run response schema contract > invalid JSON body → 400 {ok:false, error:/Invalid JSON/}
POST /run response schema contract > NDJSON stream: content-type is application/x-ndjson
POST /run response schema contract > NDJSON stream: last record is {kind:'result'}
POST /stream alias contract > POST /stream accepts the same body shape as /run
POST /kill contract > returns 200 {ok:true} when no token configured
POST /kill contract > returns 401 when token is set and no bearer supplied
unknown routes contract > GET /nonexistent returns 404 {ok:false, error:'Not found'}
